RemediationStrings.Title: AllowDomainPINLogon (OS Hardening)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System\AllowDomainPINLogon must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: OS Hardening.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnumerateLocalUsers (OS Hardening)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System\EnumerateLocalUsers must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: OS Hardening.

RemediationStrings.Title: EnableSmartScreen (OS Hardening)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System\EnableSmartScreen must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: OS Hardening.

RemediationStrings.Title: ShellSmartScreenLevel (OS Hardening)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System\ShellSmartScreenLevel must be Block. Severity: Medium. Category: OS Hardening.

RemediationStrings.Title: AllowCustomSSPsAPs (OS Hardening)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System\AllowCustomSSPsAPs must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: OS Hardening.

RemediationStrings.Title: RunAsPPL (OS Hardening)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\System\RunAsPPL must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: OS Hardening.

RemediationStrings.Title: DisableExceptionChainValidation (OS Hardening)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager\kernel\DisableExceptionChainValidation must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: OS Hardening.

RemediationStrings.Title: ProtectionMode (OS Hardening)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager\ProtectionMode must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: OS Hardening.
